name: projects-maintainer
description: Skill for continuously maintaining a personal Turborepo + pnpm monorepo (cdlab projects style)

metadata.description: Playbooks + templates for scaffolding new apps/packages, bumping pnpm catalog deps, cross-app refactors, code review, and documentation sync — all aligned with the cdlab projects-monorepo conventions (Biome, nsl, Cloudflare Workers, Drizzle, next-intl).

plugins.name: projects-maintainer
plugins.description: Use to scaffold, upgrade, refactor, review, or document any project in the cdlab projects-monorepo style.
